CustomField.description: Attaches the interaction log to this Lessor. If the log is created from the corresponding Lessor page, this field will be auto popualted
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Attaches the interaction log to this Lessor. If the log is created from the corresponding Lessor page, this field will be auto popualted
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2206 Related To Lessor
